summary: Excellent audience‑matrix recording that captures a very special show with hot, front‑row vocals.
review: The reviewer rates this release five stars, praising the vivid vocal presence and noting that the matrix mix comes close to what they heard live. They describe the performance as a "very special" show and suggest the audience‑matrix source adds an interesting listening dimension.

ai_rating.rationale: A single, highly positive 5‑star review highlights both strong vocal performance and a satisfying matrix recording; limited data prevents higher confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Hot, clear vocals that match the live experience; audience‑matrix blend captures ambience while remaining very listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer emphasizes the overall special nature of the show and strong vocal delivery, but provides no specific song or set‑list commentary.
